strengths: The recurring job is concrete enough to anchor the package.
anchor_sentence: Safely operate a running self-hosted GEOrank instance for ordinary users and verified administrators through one reusable skill. Primary output: A redacted execution receipt containing detected access level, operation, target, dry-run or executed status, API status, resource identifiers, request ID, next safe step, and rollback guidance when applicable.. Exclusions: general GEO or SEO explanation, GEO strategy creation, article writing, GEOrank repository development or review, GEOrank installation without instance operation.
recommended_action: Intent is clear enough to package the first routeable version.

context.job: Safely operate a running self-hosted GEOrank instance for ordinary users and verified administrators through one reusable skill.
real_inputs: password supplied through a hidden prompt or named environment variable
company, report, conversation, user, content, or release identifier
context.primary_output: A redacted execution receipt containing detected access level, operation, target, dry-run or executed status, API status, resource identifiers, request ID, next safe step, and rollback guidance when applicable.
context.description: Operate and manage a self-hosted GEOrank instance through its HTTP API with ordinary-user login guidance, live role detection, administrator safety gates, and redacted receipts.
constraints: passwords and tokens stay out of argv and receipts
administrator actions require a live /api/auth/me role check
destructive actions use an exact canonical path-and-query confirmation phrase
request, response, and session sizes are bounded
session replacement and removal require a recognized GEOrank format marker
uncertain write state requires a confirming read before retry
standards: cross-target packaging and isolated install verification
context.correction: The design was consolidated into one skill, and login guidance was fixed to start with an ordinary-user flow before live role detection.
user_references: GEOrank repository API routes and schemas
The approved unified-skill and ordinary-user-login decisions in this task
